description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular layout and a spacious front yard. The front facade includes a driveway with a blue car, a small lawn, and a paved walkway leading to a covered porch. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and includes a backyard with green grass. Mature trees and shrubs are present near the entrance, adding greenery and shade. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving the house a contemporary and inviting appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a covered porch, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with trees and grass.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with a blue car, covered porch, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the wooden fence, and the car parked in the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, flat roof, and the back side of the bungalow with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden fence, side windows, and the front yard with trees and driveway partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
